freedomConfigAdaptation.description: Tenant-safe values that can change at fork time without changing audit ordering, moderation handling, feed privacy, analytics aggregation, or tenant scope.

keys.semantic: Optional maximum listing price cap enforced before a marketplace listing can be published.

boundedRange.rationale: Tenants may cap marketplace prices for policy or launch-stage reasons, while zero-price listings remain valid and negative prices remain rejected.

grammarAdaptation.description: FLOW-08 has no tenant-editable DSL grammar surface.

roleScopeAdaptation.description: Marketplace browse, publish, install, and fork access is controlled by the marketplace controller role map. Tenants may tune presentation and pricing policy, not bypass role isolation.

businessDomainAdaptation.description: Tenant marketplace policies that can be changed through existing surfaces while fixed ordering and privacy invariants remain intact.

edgeCases.name: Starter marketplace price cap
edgeCases.semantic: A new tenant can cap listing prices during launch while allowing free listings and regular published listings below the cap.
edgeCases.currentImplementation: T88 reads the tenant-scoped cap and returns PRICE_EXCEEDS_CAP only when the listing price is above it.

edgeCases.name: Moderated category launch
edgeCases.semantic: A tenant can route uncertain or high-risk categories through moderation without treating moderation review as a system failure.
edgeCases.currentImplementation: T87 supports PASS, REJECT, and UNCERTAIN, and T83 stores rejected content as DRAFT rather than failing the publication flow.

edgeCases.name: Privacy-preserving buyer feed
edgeCases.semantic: A tenant can change feed presentation while the emitted feed event remains aggregate-only.
edgeCases.extensionPoint: client marketplace feed presentation and T85 maxCount input
edgeCases.currentImplementation: T85 stores the feed record and emits only count, tenantId, and generatedAt, never listing IDs or buyer history.

edgeCases.name: Aggregate marketplace analytics
edgeCases.semantic: A tenant can adapt dashboard copy and thresholds while the conversion formula and aggregate-only rule stay fixed.
edgeCases.currentImplementation: T86 computes conversionRate as inquiries / (views || 1) and does not store viewerIds.

ironRulesMACHINE.description: Fixed invariants that tenants cannot change without breaking portability or authorization certification.
rules: T83 writes the audit record before moderation, price validation, listing storage, or event emission.
T83 treats moderation rejection as a successful DRAFT outcome, never as a thrown or failed business exception.
T83 and T88 reject negative prices and accept zero-price listings.
T84 keeps catalog indexing version-keyed and idempotent.
T85 emits aggregate feed counts only and never listing IDs, seller IDs, buyer IDs, or reference IDs.
T86 keeps conversionRate as inquiries / (views || 1), not a tenant-editable formula.
T86 stores aggregate counters only and never viewerIds.
T87 preserves PASS, REJECT, and UNCERTAIN moderation paths; UNCERTAIN routes to human review.
storeDocument completes before enqueue for listing, catalog, feed, analytics, and moderation events.
All FLOW-08 services remain FLOW_SCOPED and return DataProcessResult.

tenant-a-curated-launch.description: Tenant A launches a curated marketplace with a maximum listing price while seller trust is still being established.
tenant-a-curated-launch.impact: Listings above the cap are rejected by price validation, free listings still pass, and audit-first ordering remains unchanged.
tenant-a-curated-launch.testable: Tenant A adaptation evidence shows the curated marketplace policy, and T88 tests still prove price 0 passes while prices above the cap fail.

tenant-a-service-forward-marketplace.description: Tenant A emphasizes service listings and partner-friendly marketplace cards while retaining aggregate-only feed and analytics boundaries.
tenant-a-service-forward-marketplace.impact: Marketplace copy and screenshots change, while server events, role gates, and aggregate privacy rules remain fixed.
tenant-a-service-forward-marketplace.testable: Tenant A screenshot evidence shows the adapted service-forward marketplace and the fork package CI still passes.

notPartOfAdaptationSurface.description: MACHINE elements that must not change during tenant adaptation.
elements: Task type IDs T83 through T88
Aggregate-only analytics and fixed conversion formula
CloudEvents envelope usage where events cross service boundaries

passCriteria: Tenant A can apply a TYPE-A value or presentation change without altering MACHINE constraints.
The adapted policy is present in tenant.config.json adaptationHistory.
The adapted marketplace position is visible in Tenant A visual evidence.
Auth checks still return 401 for missing token, 401 for cross-tenant token, and 403 for wrong-role token after adaptation.
